events.event_description: Template record for a public frontier model release announced by the developer through an official release note before ANX-Bench outcome inspection.

exposure_window.inclusion_rule: Include response_timestamp values greater than or equal to the event timestamp and less than the exposure window end.

baseline_window.inclusion_rule: Include response_timestamp values greater than or equal to the baseline start and strictly before the event timestamp.

follow_up_windows.inclusion_rule: Include response_timestamp values greater than or equal to the event timestamp and less than 72 hours after the event timestamp.
Include response_timestamp values on or after the short follow-up start and strictly before the short follow-up end.
Include response_timestamp values on or after the extended follow-up start and strictly before the extended follow-up end.

competing_events.reason_for_inclusion: The announcement falls inside the immediate exposure window and could independently affect AI-related anxiety estimates.

events.event_description: Reserved record for calibration or routine longitudinal waves that are explicitly not tied to a discrete AI event-study exposure.
